title: Spanish Paella
description: A classic Spanish dish made with saffron-infused rice, seafood, and vegetables. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chorizo and cook until crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the seafood mix and cook until pink, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the tomato, paprika, and saffron, and stir to combine.
Add the rice and stir to combine with the vegetables and seafood.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, then add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is tender.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
